dropped_features.rms_uv: Redundant with mean_uv and std_uv because RMS² = mean² + variance.
dropped_features.signal_energy_uv2: Deterministically equal to mean square multiplied by sample count.
dropped_features.total_band_power_uv2: Deterministically equal to the sum of absolute band powers.
dropped_features.relative_beta_power: Linearly determined by the other four relative powers because their sum is one.
dropped_features.delta_theta_ratio: Removed after empirical Spearman correlation magnitude exceeded 0.995.

split_policy.reason: Epochs from the same subject are correlated and must not cross dataset partitions.

current_dataset_scope.purpose: Local pipeline validation only; final benchmarking must use the larger Kaggle execution dataset.
